---
title : "Figure 8.1"
subtitle : "Regularization path of the Lasso"
author : "Thimoté Dupuch"
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme:
      light: zephyr
      dark: darkly
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg
Pkg.activate("../..")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using LinearAlgebra, Random, Statistics, CairoMakie
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
function run_lasso_path(; seed=8, n=32, d=12, k=4, std_noise=1.0)
    rng = MersenneTwister(seed)
    X = randn(rng, n, d)
    wast = zeros(d)
    wast[1:k] = sign.(randn(rng, k))
    y = X * wast + std_noise * sqrt(k) * randn(rng, n)

    lambdas = collect(1.5:-0.0005:0.0)
    L = maximum(real(eigvals(X'*X / n)))

    ws = zeros(d, length(lambdas))
    w = zeros(d)

    for (ilambda, lambda) in enumerate(lambdas)
        maxiter = 100
        for iter in 1:maxiter
            grad = (1.0 / n) * X' * (X * w - y)
            w -= (1.0 / L) * grad
            w = sign.(w) .* max.(abs.(w) .- lambda / L, 0.0)
        end
        ws[:, ilambda] = w
    end

    # Filter to when number of active components changes to match matlab line style
    nactive = sum(abs.(ws) .> 1e-4, dims=1)[:]
    diffs = abs.(nactive[2:end] .- nactive[1:end-1])
    ind = [findall(diffs .> 0)..., length(lambdas)]

    return lambdas[ind], ws[:, ind]
end
```

```{julia}
lambdas_plot, ws_plot = run_lasso_path()
```

```{julia}
fig = Figure(size=(800, 600), fontsize=18)
ax = Axis(fig[1, 1], xlabel="regularization parameter", ylabel="weights", title="Lasso Path")

for i in 1:size(ws_plot, 1)
    lines!(ax, lambdas_plot, ws_plot[i, :], linewidth=2)
end

fig
```
